name: _advprec_matmul_fp8
note: Correct FP8 matmul. The op is preserve, but classify labels it compress because the fp8 rounding/saturation of the output makes the reference's gain non-uniform; either way the low-bit output forces abstain (the low-bit check fires first). Shows the abstain rule is precision-driven and applies across op_classes.

expected.classify: compress low_bit (fp8 rounding reads as compress) -> J3/abstain
